satire_attempt: Satire attempt: 'just do your karma-yoga and your migrations will deploy themselves' — but the engineering body for 3.10 explicitly anchors the claim in named tools, named scenarios, and a falsifiable predicate. The mockable surface is not what the verse-record actually says.
verdict_reason: 3.10's engineering layer is too concrete to be trivially mocked. The scenario fixes the verse in real engineering vocabulary (founder structures the customer relationship as a loop from day one); the falsifiability and counter-example sections preempt the cynic's standard moves. The verse cannot be reduced to a motivational poster without misrepresenting it.
